series_metadata.series_title: Administrative Files: Minutes of the Consumer Finance Education Board
series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of the minutes of the Consumer Finance Education Board meeting.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy minutes in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, transfer to State Archives. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for two (2) years, and then destroy., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Erase
